title: Statistics
summary: This is the Bank of Canada's statistics portal index page, listing available data categories including exchange rates, interest rates, money market yields, price indexes, and economic indicators. The page provides access to various data lookup tools and download options but does not contain any specific data values, policy decisions, or research findings—it is a navigation page for the Bank's data offerings.
key_points: Page is a data portal index listing available statistical categories from the Bank of Canada
Categories include: exchange rates (daily/monthly/annual), money market yields, bond yields, key monetary policy variables
Data available in XML, JSON, and CSV formats via the Valet API
Publication schedules noted: exchange rates at 16:30 ET, interest rates at 12:15-12:30 ET, bond yields at 09:30-10:00 ET
No specific data values, policy announcements, or analysis contained on this page
Staff economic projections released with a five-year lag
why_it_matters: This page has no direct market relevance as it contains no specific data or policy content. It serves only as a navigation index to the Bank of Canada's statistical database.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page (navigation portal) per source_type field — violates CORE RULE 5
No substantive content: only lists available data categories with no specific data values, policy decisions, or research findings
No published_at date — source has no temporal anchor
Cannot extract any market-relevant information or macro catalyst content
Record appropriately identifies source as non-archiveable but suggests wrong status

notes: This source is a Bank of Canada statistics portal index page (listing_page), not a research document or data release. It contains no specific content suitable for archiving—only links and descriptions of available data categories. Per CORE RULE 6, listing pages and navigation pages should be treated as non-archiveable. The page has no published_at date as it is a persistent portal. No macro catalyst or market structure content is present.
